system_requirements.statement: The system shall execute the binary process using local resources only, without requiring network connectivity.
The system shall parse command line arguments to create a new task record in the local file storage.
The system shall retrieve and display all stored task records from the local file to the user.
The system shall modify the existing task record in the local file based on provided status or description arguments.
The system shall remove the specified task record from the local file storage upon command execution.
The system shall validate file path permissions and integrity before writing or reading task data.
The system shall handle file I/O errors gracefully and return appropriate status codes without crashing.
